initcondition.formula: ( "Created By" IN ("Current User") OR "User Role" IN ("Role1") )

showmessageaction.messagetext: Attention: Click on the "Submit for Approval" button on the Purchase Order after Save.

returnusererroraction.errortext: This transaction requires a selection in either the Blue Collar Project or Department field at the top (header) of the form.

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'
( isChecked("Is Billable") = 'T' AND "Total" > 10000.00 ) OR ( isChecked("Is Billable") = 'F' AND "Total" > 1000.00 ) AND "Subsidiary (Main)" NOT IN ("{#Subsidiary#}1")
( "Total" <= 1000.00 AND isChecked("Is Billable") = 'F' ) OR ( "Total" <= 10000.00 AND isChecked("Is Billable") = 'T' ) AND "Subsidiary (Main)" NOT IN ("{#Subsidiary#}1")

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'

sendemailaction.subject: PO {TRANID} Rejected
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'
( isChecked("Is Billable") = 'T' AND "Total" > 50000.00 ) OR ( isChecked("Is Billable") = 'F' AND "Total" > 10000.00 )
( isChecked("Is Billable") = 'T' AND "Total" <= 50000.00 ) OR ( isChecked("Is Billable") = 'F' AND "Total" <= 10000.00 )

sendemailaction.subject: PO {TRANID} approved

initcondition.formula: "User Role" NOT IN ("Role1","Role2","Role3","Role4","Role5","Role6") AND "Status" NOT IN ("Transaction Status1")

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'

sendemailaction.subject: You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}
You have a PO to approve {tranid} - {entity}

initcondition.formula: "Old Record:Next Approver" NOT IN ("Next Approver") AND isEmpty("Next Approver:E-mail") = 'F'
